items.summary: Improve GST calculation precision in the backend Motoko actor to eliminate rounding errors. Use high-precision integer arithmetic (paise-level) throughout all GST computation steps — including CGST, SGST, and IGST — ensuring that intermediate values are never truncated or rounded prematurely. Final amounts should only be rounded at the very last step before storage.

Improve GST calculation precision in the frontend gstUtils.ts utility to exactly mirror the updated backend logic. Ensure all per-line-item and full-invoice GST summary calculations use integer paise arithmetic throughout, rounding only at the final display step. The frontend computed totals must match backend-stored values exactly.
